name: Region Midtjylland (Central Denmark Region)

colors.symbolism: the white field of the regional logo
the brown wordmark 'Region Midtjylland' and stylised graphic

description: A white field charged at the centre with the brown logotype of Region Midtjylland.
history: Region Midtjylland was established on 1 January 2007 by the Danish Local Government Reform (Strukturreformen). The flag carries the region's official corporate identity logo.

features.symbolism: the official wordmark of Region Midtjylland (the Central Denmark Region), one of the five regions established in the 2007 local-government reform
